mapper.sql: id, proj_id, sys_no, sub_user, sub_date, audit_status, data_status, situation1, situation2, situation3, situation4, situation5, situation6, situation7, situation8, situation9, situation10, situation11, situation12, situation13, situation14, situation15
mapper.select: select id from srm_project_finalcheck where proj_id=#{projId} limit 1

select spfc.id as rowId, spfc.proj_id as "projId.id",spi.name as "projId.name",spfc.sys_no as sysNo, spfc.data_status as dataStatus,spfc.audit_status as auditStatus, situation1, situation2, situation3, situation4, situation5, situation6, situation7, situation8, situation9, situation10, situation11, situation12, situation13, situation14, situation15 from srm_project_finalcheck spfc left join srm_projects_info spi on spi.id=spfc.proj_id
where spfc.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_project_finalcheck
data_status = #{status},
audit_status = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select:
select spsg.id as rowId,csy.name as yearName, spif.name as projectName,spif.id as projectId, csu.name as applyUserName, spif.sub_date as subDate,spsg.note as note, spsg.audit_status as auditStatus,spsg.data_status as dataStatus from srm_project_solicit_grade spsg left join srm_project_finalcheck spf on spf.id=spsg.project_id left join srm_projects_info spif on spif.id=spf.proj_id left join ct_srm_user csu on csu.id=spif.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=spif.year where spsg.expert=#{projectsInfoDto.userId} and spsg.sys_no=#{projectsInfoDto.sysNo}
and spif.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectsInfoDto.name}, '%')
